from __future__ import annotations

import logging

LOGGER = logging.getLogger(__name__)


def high_frequency_code_path_logs_without_sampling_or_rate_limit_negative(request_ids: list[str]) -> None:
    for index, request_id in enumerate(request_ids, start=1):
        if index % 100 == 0:
            LOGGER.info("sampled request_id=%s", request_id)
